name: @patchworkos/incident-war-room
description: Ops incident response: summarize alert, open Linear issue, post to #incidents Slack, then append post-incident summary to Notion.
author: patchworkos

incident_description.description: Free-text description of the incident or PagerDuty alert body

LINEAR_TEAM_ID.description: Linear team ID where the incident issue will be created

LINEAR_INCIDENT_LABEL.description: Linear label to apply to incident issues

SLACK_INCIDENTS_CHANNEL.description: Slack channel to post the incident alert (e.g. #incidents)

NOTION_INCIDENTS_DB.description: Notion database ID where post-incident summaries are logged
